log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Aasimar — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Aasimar — Armored Tank (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Aasimar — Armored Tank
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 20] HIT! 15 damage. Aasimar — Armored Tank HP: 44/59
→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 20] MISS.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Aasimar — Armored Tank --- HP: 44/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:6+4=10 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:14+4=18 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Aasimar — Armored Tank --- HP: 44/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:5+4=9 vs DC 15] FAIL! 8 psychic damage. HP: 170/178
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 170/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Aasimar — Armored Tank (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Aasimar — Armored Tank
→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 20] HIT! 20 damage. Aasimar — Armored Tank HP: 24/59
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):12+4=16 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 20] HIT! 18 damage. Aasimar — Armored Tank HP: 6/59
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):12+4=16 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
══ ROUND 4 ══
--- Aasimar — Armored Tank --- HP: 6/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (6/59). Going invisible for survival.
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Aasimar — Armored Tank is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 170/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Aasimar — Armored Tank (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Aasimar — Armored Tank
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 20] MISS.
══ ROUND 5 ══
--- Aasimar — Armored Tank --- HP: 6/59 | AC: 20 | Cond: [invisible] | Conc: Greater Invisibility
REASONING: Concentrating on Greater Invisibility. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:17+4=21 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 170/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Aasimar — Armored Tank (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Aasimar — Armored Tank
→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 20] HIT! 24 damage. Aasimar — Armored Tank HP: -18/59
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):14+4=18 vs DC 12] MAINTAINED!
══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Aasimar — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:1+4=5 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.

REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
